subject: Late Delivery
message: My order has been delayed for 4 days and there is no shipping update.

subject: Wrong Product
message: I received a different product than the one I ordered.
reply: We apologize for the mistake. The correct product will be shipped within 48 hours.

subject: Payment Issue
message: The payment was deducted but my order was not confirmed.

subject: Cancel Order
message: I would like to cancel my order before it is shipped.
reply: Your order has been successfully canceled and the refund has been processed.

subject: Account Problem
message: I am unable to log in to my account.
reply: Your password has been reset. Please try logging in again.
